tasks.description: Create api/health.go with a HealthHandler function that responds to GET /healthz with HTTP 200 and a JSON body {"status": "ok"}. Register the route on the server router in api/server.go.

acceptance_criteria.when: A GET request is sent to /healthz
acceptance_criteria.then: A 200 JSON response is returned with a 'status' field equal to 'ok'

tasks.description: Add Go tests in api/health_test.go that verify the /healthz endpoint returns HTTP 200 with the correct JSON payload. Update monitoring/config.yaml to add /healthz as a scrape target with a 30-second interval.

acceptance_criteria.given: The /healthz endpoint is implemented in api/health.go
acceptance_criteria.when: go test is executed against the api package
acceptance_criteria.then: All tests pass verifying the /healthz endpoint returns HTTP 200 with {"status": "ok"}
